infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: CyAccess uses the camera to let you photograph hazards and classroom boards.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: CyAccess lets you choose photos of hazards or classroom boards.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: CyAccess uses the microphone so you can ask Cy for help out loud.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: CyAccess shows your position on the campus map and finds nearby accessibility features.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: CyAccess uses speech recognition for Ask Cy voice commands.

plugins.cameraPermission: CyAccess needs camera access to photograph hazards and classroom boards.

plugins.photosPermission: CyAccess needs photo library access to select images of hazards or boards.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: CyAccess uses your location to show nearby accessibility features and hazards.
